---
title: "Sperner's Lemma"
author: Apurva Nakade
date: 2026-07-13
listing:
  contents: "/*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

<!--
Copyright (c) 2025 Apurva Nakade. All rights reserved.
Released under Apache 2.0 license as described in the file LICENSE.
Authors: Apurva Nakade
-->

Sperner's lemma is a combinatorial statement about colorings of triangulated triangles, with two very different classic proofs — one combinatorial, one geometric.
